title: artocarpus palembanicus
intro: Artocarpus palembanicus, also known as the Palembang jackfruit tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Moraceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Artocarpus palembanicus include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and acting as an anti-diarrheal agent. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve boiling its leaves or roots in water to make a medicinal tea, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
